problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to and, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
